checks.command: git diff HEAD --numstat -- bootstrap.sh is exactly +1/-1; unscoped diff (minus .agent/) touches only bootstrap.sh

adversarial_check.description: Two-part check beyond the 5 listed commands. (a) Extracted DEFAULT_GOVERNANCE_REPO_URL from bootstrap.sh and matched it against a strict regex for a well-formed https GitHub URL ending in .git -- 'https://github.com/niq-cnr/nizam-framework.git' matches. (b) Ran 'bootstrap.sh --verify-only' against a fresh scratchpad directory with no .nizam/ present -- correctly errored 'target directory .nizam does not exist' and exited 1, proving the one-line URL edit did not alter --verify-only's pre-existing no-target failure behavior.
